metadata.name: Japan Briefing
metadata.description: Daily news briefing for the NYT Tokyo Bureau Chief

all.headline: イラン モジタバ師 初声明「ホルムズ海峡の封鎖 確実に継続」
all.description: アメリカやイスラエルとの激しい攻撃の応酬が続く中、イランの新しい最高指導者に選出されたモジタバ師のものとする初めての声明が発表され、徹底抗戦の構えを示すとともに、「敵への圧力の一環としてホルムズ海峡の封鎖は、確実に継続されなければならない」と強調しました。

all.headline: 湾岸諸国の石油生産量 世界需要の約1割相当が減少 IEA分析
all.description: IEA＝国際エネルギー機関は石油市場に関する報告書を公表し、イラン情勢を受けて中東の湾岸諸国の石油生産量は、世界の需要のおよそ1割にあたる1日あたり少なくとも1000万バレル減少したとする分析を明らかにしました。

all.headline: 新年度予算案 与党側きょう衆院通過させる方針 与野党攻防激化
all.description: 新年度予算案をめぐり、年度内成立を目指す与党側は、13日衆議院予算委員会と本会議で採決し、衆議院を通過させる方針です。これに対し野党4党は、強引な運営だとして自民党の坂本予算委員長の解任決議案を提出し、与野党の攻防が激しくなっています。

all.headline: “手術中に神経切断”医師に有罪判決 赤穂市民病院 医療事故
all.description: 2020年、兵庫県赤穂市の市民病院で手術の際に、女性患者の神経を誤って切断し重い障害を負わせたとして、業務上過失傷害の罪に問われた医師に、神戸地方裁判所姫路支部は執行猶予のついた有罪判決を言い渡しました。

all.headline: ホンダ巨額損失 最終赤字へ 戦略の抜本的見直し迫られることに
all.description: 「ホンダ」は北米のEV事業を見直した結果、巨額の損失が発生し、今年度の業績が最大で6900億円の最終赤字に転落するという見通しを明らかにしました。会社は2040年に販売する新車すべてをEVと燃料電池車にする目標を掲げてきましたが、今後はハイブリッド車の強化など戦略の抜本的な見直しが迫られることになります。

all.headline: NYダウ 700ドル超値下がり ホルムズ海峡封鎖が続くとの懸念
all.description: 12日のニューヨーク株式市場では、ホルムズ海峡が事実上、封鎖された状態が続くとの懸念から売り注文が広がり、ダウ平均株価は前日と比べて700ドルを超える値下がりとなりました。さらに、原油の先物価格が上昇する中、アメリカでインフレが再加速することへの警戒感も強まっています。

all.headline: スマホ決済大手「PayPay」 米 ナスダックに株式を上場
all.description: スマホ決済大手の「PayPay」がアメリカの証券取引所、ナスダックに株式を上場しました。会社としては上場によって調達した資金で海外事業の拡大につなげたい考えです。

all.headline: Approval rate for Takaichi's Cabinet drops to 59%: poll
all.description: The rate fell to the lowest level since Takaichi's inauguration last October, but it remained relatively high after rising to 63.8% last month.

all.headline: ‘Tony Takitani’: Haunting Murakami adaptation rendered beautifully in new 4K restoration
all.description: Few Haruki Murakami screen adaptations capture the author’s melancholy as beautifully as Jun Ichikawa’s 2004 “Tony Takitani.”

all.headline: ‘The Specials’: Dancing assassins stumble in clumsy caper
all.description: With gunfights, dance routines and nostalgic pop hits, Eiji Uchida’s film has a fun concept but struggles to make it work.

all.headline: Japan not planning to send minesweepers to Middle East, Takaichi says
all.description: The prime minister said that while details about the use of sea mines are unclear, Japan wouldn’t be able to get involved in mine clearance as long as the conflict continues.

all.headline: Takaichi backs education minister after affair report
all.description: The allegation of an extramarital affair by Yohei Matsumoto was reported by Bunshun Online, the digital version of the weekly Shukan Bunshun magazine.

all.headline: Honda warns of ¥2.5 trillion charge on global EV downturn
all.description: The carmaker said Thursday that it would cancel the development and launch of three EV models that had been planned for North America.

all.headline: China passes ethnic unity law to advance Xi’s assimilation push
all.description: For critics, the law adds to pressure on minorities across the Han Chinese-majority country.

all.headline: Vance treads Iran tightrope with an eye on 2028
all.description: A former U.S. Marine, Vice President JD Vance has built a political brand as a noninterventionist who wanted to keep the United States out of anymore long, foreign wars.

all.headline: U.S. to investigate Japan and other countries for unfair trade practices
all.description: President Donald Trump could impose tariffs based on findings of Section 301 inquiries.

all.headline: Microsoft's Copilot AI goes head-to-head with China's DeepSeek in Africa
all.description: The U.S. technology giant is making a push for more Africans to adopt its artificial-intelligence tools in the world’s youngest and fastest-growing population.

all.headline: Video shows moment point-blank gunshot misses Indian politician
all.description: Senior Kashmir leader Farooq Abdullah escaped unhurt after the incident and the suspect is in custody.

all.description: The law states that children should be taught Mandarin before kindergarten, until the end of high school.

all.headline: Bodies of two Chinese backpackers found in Australian floodwaters
all.description: The pair had been reported missing on Tuesday after failing to reach their destination.

all.headline: UK couple die after being pulled from water at Australian beach
all.description: Local police say members of the public pulled the couple from the water and tried to save them.

all.headline: India's top court allows removal of life support of man in vegetative state
all.description: Harish Rana has been in a vegetative state since 2013, when he fell from a balcony and suffered head injuries.

all.headline: India's IndiGo airline CEO resigns months after mass cancellation crisis
all.description: The airline has said Peiter Elbers stepped down for "personal reasons", without sharing further details.

all.headline: China and North Korea to reopen passenger train service after pandemic halt
all.description: Tickets for the first train departing on Thursday have reportedly sold out.

all.headline: How Indonesia's new sex laws will affect tourists
all.description: International travelers have been flocking back to the popular resort island of Bali as the Covid pandemic subsides, prompting hopes that Indonesia's battered tourism industry is on the road to recove

North Korea
This 'edible' plastic bag alternative could save Nara's sacred deer
all.description: A local entrepreneur in the Japanese tourist destination of Nara has developed an alternative to plastic shopping bags, to protect the town's sacred deer.

all.headline: The battle to save Sri Lanka's leopards
all.description: Having endured a bloody civil war from 1983 until 2009, Sri Lanka is now at peace and developing rapidly. That's good news for the country as a whole, but the island nation's leopards are under threat

all.headline: Wildlife is flourishing around Fukushima
all.description: Nearly a decade after Japan's Fukushima nuclear disaster, researchers have discovered that wildlife is thriving in the areas evacuated by humans, despite radiological contamination.

all.headline: China debuts 620 kph train prototype
all.description: China has revealed a prototype for a new high-speed Maglev train that is capable of reaching speeds of 620 kilometers (385 miles) per hour.

all.headline: A Shanghai building 'walks' to a new location
all.description: Shanghai residents passing through the city's eastern Huangpu district in October might have stumbled upon an unusual sight: a "walking" building.

all.headline: Self-driving robotaxis are taking off in China
all.description: The world has been inching toward fully autonomous cars for years. In China, one company just got even closer to making it a reality.

all.headline: Travel to Japan during Covid-19: What you need to know
all.description: If you're planning a trip to Japan, here's what you'll need to know and expect if you want to visit during the global coronavirus pandemic.

primary.headline: イラン モジタバ師 初声明「ホルムズ海峡の封鎖 確実に継続」
primary.description: アメリカやイスラエルとの激しい攻撃の応酬が続く中、イランの新しい最高指導者に選出されたモジタバ師のものとする初めての声明が発表され、徹底抗戦の構えを示すとともに、「敵への圧力の一環としてホルムズ海峡の封鎖は、確実に継続されなければならない」と強調しました。

primary.headline: 湾岸諸国の石油生産量 世界需要の約1割相当が減少 IEA分析
primary.description: IEA＝国際エネルギー機関は石油市場に関する報告書を公表し、イラン情勢を受けて中東の湾岸諸国の石油生産量は、世界の需要のおよそ1割にあたる1日あたり少なくとも1000万バレル減少したとする分析を明らかにしました。

primary.headline: 新年度予算案 与党側きょう衆院通過させる方針 与野党攻防激化
primary.description: 新年度予算案をめぐり、年度内成立を目指す与党側は、13日衆議院予算委員会と本会議で採決し、衆議院を通過させる方針です。これに対し野党4党は、強引な運営だとして自民党の坂本予算委員長の解任決議案を提出し、与野党の攻防が激しくなっています。

primary.headline: “手術中に神経切断”医師に有罪判決 赤穂市民病院 医療事故
primary.description: 2020年、兵庫県赤穂市の市民病院で手術の際に、女性患者の神経を誤って切断し重い障害を負わせたとして、業務上過失傷害の罪に問われた医師に、神戸地方裁判所姫路支部は執行猶予のついた有罪判決を言い渡しました。

primary.headline: ホンダ巨額損失 最終赤字へ 戦略の抜本的見直し迫られることに
primary.description: 「ホンダ」は北米のEV事業を見直した結果、巨額の損失が発生し、今年度の業績が最大で6900億円の最終赤字に転落するという見通しを明らかにしました。会社は2040年に販売する新車すべてをEVと燃料電池車にする目標を掲げてきましたが、今後はハイブリッド車の強化など戦略の抜本的な見直しが迫られることになります。

primary.headline: NYダウ 700ドル超値下がり ホルムズ海峡封鎖が続くとの懸念
primary.description: 12日のニューヨーク株式市場では、ホルムズ海峡が事実上、封鎖された状態が続くとの懸念から売り注文が広がり、ダウ平均株価は前日と比べて700ドルを超える値下がりとなりました。さらに、原油の先物価格が上昇する中、アメリカでインフレが再加速することへの警戒感も強まっています。

primary.headline: スマホ決済大手「PayPay」 米 ナスダックに株式を上場
primary.description: スマホ決済大手の「PayPay」がアメリカの証券取引所、ナスダックに株式を上場しました。会社としては上場によって調達した資金で海外事業の拡大につなげたい考えです。

screenshots.name: Takaichi Sanae
tweets:
It was late at night in Japan time, but I recently attended an online meeting of the G7 leaders.

The G7 leaders held frank discussions about the impact of the current increasingly tense situation in the Middle East on the global economy, financial and energy markets, ensuring the safety of maritime shipping routes including the Strait of Hormuz, and cooperation in protecting their own people in the region.

At last year's extraordinary Diet session, we prioritized ``responding to the high prices'' that the people are facing, and achieved ``reducing the prices of gasoline and diesel oil'' based on the abolition of the provisional tax rate and the supplementary budget that was passed.

Today, I attended the Great East Japan Earthquake Memorial and Reconstruction Prayer Ceremony held in Fukushima City, Fukushima Prefecture, offered a moment of silence, delivered an address of condolence, and then laid flowers.


https://
kantei.go.jp/jp/105/actions
/202603/11kinenshiki.html
…

Fifteen years have passed since the Great East Japan Earthquake.
Many irreplaceable lives were lost, and there are still people missing.

A while ago, a chartered plane from Dubai arrived at Haneda Airport, and a chartered plane from Riyadh arrived at Narita Airport.
Thank you to everyone for your hard work on the long journey.

A government-chartered plane carrying people eligible for departure assistance recently departed from Riyadh, the capital of Saudi Arabia, for Japan. Those on board were from Kuwait, Bahrain, Qatar, and Saudi Arabia. The aircraft was the second government-chartered flight from Riyadh that operated on March 9.
